ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE HEARING SET FOR MAR-07-2012 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE IS CONTINUED TO MARCH 26, 2012 ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION. THE COURT DID NOT RECEIVE COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS OR OPPOSITION PAPERS AS REQUIRED BY LOCAL RULE 2.6B. PETITIONER SHALL PROVIDE A COPY OF THE PETITION AND MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF THE PETITION AND RESPONDENT SHALL PROVIDE A COPY OF THE OPPOSITION AND ANSWER TO THE PETITION TO DEPARTMENT 302 BY MARCH 12, 2012 ACCOMPANIED BY COVER LETTERS STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN, COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR 7077

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER TERESA POBLETE'S PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE IS DENIED. TAKING INTO ACCOUNT THE STRONG PRESUMPTION OF CORRECTNESS ACCORDED TO THE ADMINISTRATIVE FINDINGS, THE WEIGHT OF THE EVIDENCE SUPPORTS THE FINDING THAT OFFICER RAMOS PROVIDED THE REQUIRED ADMONITION TO MS. POBLETE. (REPORTER'S TRANSCRIPT, P. 86:5 - 88:23, 125:19 - 126:24.) ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
Petition For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Mar-26-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. AUSTIN J. CATTERMOLE, DEPUTY ATTORNEY GENERAL, TEL. NO. 622-2190 APPEARING FORR THE RESPONDENT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Petitioner Teresa Poblete's Petition For Writ Of Mandate is Denied. Taking into account the strong presumption of correctness accorded to the administrative findings, the weight of the evidence supports the finding that Officer Ramos provided the required admonition to Ms. Poblete. (Reporter's Transcript, p. 86:5 - 88:23, 125:19 - 126:24.) ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported. = (302/HEK)

Petition For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Mar-07-2012 Continued To Mar-26-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Petition For Writ Of Mandate.
Continued to March 26, 2012 on the Court's own motion. The Court did not receive courtesy copies of the moving papers or opposition papers as required by Local Rule 2.6B. Petitioner shall provide a copy of the Petition and Memorandum of Points and Authorities in Support of the Petition and Respondent shall provide a copy of the Opposition and Answer to the Petition to Department 302 by March 12, 2012 accompanied by cover letters stating the new hearing date. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR 7077
